assertions.title: Widget data-* Attribute Documentation Complete
assertions.reason: Documentation file exists at docs/widget-attributes.md with all 9 required attributes documented (data-project, data-position, data-color, data-theme, data-reviewer, data-endpoint, data-collect-email, data-admin, data-offset-x, data-offset-y). Each attribute has description, valid values, default value, and example usage.
evidence: All 9 attributes documented with complete metadata
Contains: data-project, data-position, data-color, data-theme, data-reviewer, data-endpoint, data-collect-email, data-admin, data-offset-x, data-offset-y

assertions.title: CLI Command Reference Complete
assertions.reason: Documentation file exists at docs/cli-reference.md with all 21+ commands documented. Each command includes description, usage syntax, flags table, and examples. Commands: init, list, show, export, hotspots, reviewers, delete, resolve, inject, serve, pull, push, sync, remote, login, logout, whoami, share, shares, unshare, config, update, version, deploy.
evidence: Each command has: description, usage, flags, examples

assertions.title: Self-Hosting Setup Guide Complete
assertions.reason: Guide exists at docs/self-hosting.md (7810 bytes, exceeds 2000 byte minimum). Contains: prerequisites with version requirements (Node.js 18+, Wrangler 4.0+), step-by-step commands for scaffolding D1/R2, environment variables documentation, troubleshooting section, and cost estimates.

assertions.title: ratatui Dependency Removed
assertions.reason: ratatui is absent from Cargo.toml dependencies. No source references to ratatui in CLI source code. cargo tree | grep ratatui returns empty. src/tui.rs and src/commands/dashboard.rs do not exist.
evidence: Command 'cargo tree | grep ratatui' returns empty (no transitive deps)
rg 'use ratatui|ratatui::' cli/src - no matches found

assertions.title: crossterm Dependency Removed
assertions.reason: crossterm is not a direct dependency in Cargo.toml. No source code references to crossterm. The crossterm found in cargo tree is a transitive dependency of comfy-table (terminal styling library), which is acceptable as the specification targets direct dependencies only.
evidence: rg 'use crossterm|crossterm::' cli/src - no matches found
crossterm appears only as transitive dep via comfy-table v7.2.2 -> crossterm v0.29.0
No direct crossterm usage in application code

assertions.title: TUI Module Files Removed
assertions.reason: All TUI-specific files removed: src/tui.rs does not exist, src/commands/dashboard.rs does not exist, commands/mod.rs does not declare dashboard module, main.rs does not reference TUI or dashboard modules. Clean build succeeds with only pre-existing dead code warnings (unrelated to TUI).
evidence: ls cli/src/tui.rs: No such file or directory
ls cli/src/commands/dashboard.rs: No such file or directory
commands/mod.rs: 25 modules declared, dashboard NOT in list
main.rs Commands enum: 25 variants, no Dashboard variant
cargo build: succeeded with 8 pre-existing dead code warnings (unrelated to TUI)

summary: All 6 assertions passed. Documentation files exist with required content. Dependencies ratatui and crossterm (direct) removed. TUI module files removed. Build succeeds without TUI-related warnings.
